title: G.S.R. 284 (E) 26th April 1999
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. I97| NEW DELHI, MONDAY, APRIL 26, I999/VAISAKHA 6, 1921 MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE (Department of Agriculture and Cooperation) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 23rd April. 1999 G.S.R. 284(E).—In the English version of the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Agricul- ture. Department of Agriculture and Cooperation No. GSR 521(E), dated the 25th August, 1998 published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary), Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) dated the 25th August, 1998 at pages 3 and 4 : (i) In the introductory para, in line 5 for 'five' read 'forty-five', (ii) In para 3, line 4, for 'of read 'or', (iii) In para 4, line 3, for 'Insecticide' read 'Insecticides'. [File No. 19-3/96-PP-I] P. D. SUDHAKAR, Jt. Secy. I265 GI/99 Printed by the Manager. Govt. of India Press. Ring Road. Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
